title: City to Host Public Meeting for James Street Improvement Project
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will host a public meeting on July 8, 2026, to present preliminary designs for the James Street improvement project (State Street to Grant Boulevard) and gather community feedback. The $-undisclosed project will resurface roadway, replace aging infrastructure, and implement the City's 'Dig Once' approach with sidewalks, curb ramps, shared-use paths, traffic signals, water/lead service line replacements, drainage improvements, and tree plantings. Public comment period extends through July 17, 2026.

political_signal.description: Public meeting demonstrates commitment to transparency, community engagement, and integrated infrastructure modernization aligned with sustainability and equity goals (lead service line replacement, accessibility improvements, multimodal transportation).
